channel.title: Technology on サンレイ
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on サンレイ

item.title: 6 Best Linux Distros for Beginners who to migrate from Windows
item.description: For Windows users looking to explore Linux, selecting the right distribution is crucial. Here are 6 of the best Linux distros available today, ideal for those migration from Windows.

item.title: Windows vs Linux: Which is More Suitable for Programmers?
item.description: Windows and Linux comparison for users: advantages, disadvantages, and which is better for coding.
